feed.description: Long-form conversations about sustainability, systems thinking, and the ideas shaping our shared future.
feed.title: The Long View

bullets: Welcome back to The Long View. I'm Alex Morgan, and my guest is Dr. Elena Fischer, a sustainability researcher and systems thinker. Elena, welcome.
Because it hides the hard part. Sustainability is a systems problem — you cannot optimize one part without moving another. Fix emissions in isolation and you push the cost into water, or land, or t…
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to The Long View. I'm Alex Morgan, and my guest is Dr. Elena Fischer, a sustainability researcher and systems thinker. Elena, welcome.
summary.title: Sustainability Is a Systems Problem
